creator: avilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, repocopy the following ports in preparation to Calligra 2.4 release:

editors/koffice-kde4 -> editors/calligra
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n -> editors/calligra-l10n
ukrainian/koffice-kde4-l10n -> ukrainian/calligra-l10n
german/koffice-kde4-l10n -> german/calligra-l10n
russian/koffice-kde4-l10n -> russian/calligra-l10n
polish/koffice-kde4-l10n -> polish/calligra-l10n
portuguese/koffice-kde4-l10n-pt_BR -> portuguese/calligra-l10n-pt_BR
portuguese/koffice-kde4-l10n -> portuguese/calligra-l10n
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-sv -> editors/calligra-l10n-sv
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-en_GB -> editors/calligra-l10n-en_GB
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-fi -> editors/calligra-l10n-fi
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-el -> editors/calligra-l10n-el
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-da -> editors/calligra-l10n-da
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-sk -> editors/calligra-l10n-sk
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-kk -> editors/calligra-l10n-kk
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-ca -> editors/calligra-l10n-ca
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-it -> editors/calligra-l10n-it
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-es -> editors/calligra-l10n-es
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-et -> editors/calligra-l10n-et
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-nb -> editors/calligra-l10n-nb
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-nl -> editors/calligra-l10n-nl
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-nds -> editors/calligra-l10n-nds
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-ca_valencia -> editors/calligra-l10n-ca_valencia
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-cs -> editors/calligra-l10n-cs
french/koffice-kde4-l10n -> french/calligra-l10n
chinese/koffice-kde4-l10n-zh_TW -> chinese/calligra-l10n-zh_TW
chinese/koffice-kde4-l10n-zh_CN -> chinese/calligra-l10n-zh_CN
hungarian/koffice-kde4-l10n -> hungarian/calligra-l10n

Unfortunately, due to a buggy script we used to sync our repository, all Calligra ports were already created in CVS, but they have no history, so you first have to delete them. Additionally, could you please *only delete* the following ports (which won't make it in the release)?

editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-gl -> editors/calligra-l10n-gl
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-wa -> editors/calligra-l10n-wa
editors/koffice-kde4-l10n-tr -> editors/calligra-l10n-tr
japanese/koffice-kde4-l10n -> japanese/calligra-l10n
